overall.description: Static cinematic shot of the Hogwarts Great Hall from a video game, showing students dining at long house tables beneath floating candles in a grand gothic hall with vaulted ceilings and tall arched windows.

segments.scene_description: A static view of the Great Hall from a Harry Potter game, showing the Gryffindor banner in the foreground and students dining at long tables. Floating candles illuminate the gothic stone architecture while the camera remains stationary, capturing the bustling dinner scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of the Hogwarts Great Hall, capturing the atmospheric grandeur of a bustling student dinner. It begins with a focus on the Gryffindor banner in the foreground, framing the long house tables where students are gathered. The perspective remains steady, allowing the eye to drift from the dining activity toward the towering gothic stone architecture. Finally, the scene emphasizes the magical ambiance as hundreds of floating candles cast a warm, flickering glow across the vaulted ceilings and arched windows.
